events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need evaluate sequence violation: brazing without nitrogen purge, black scale inside. Work in progress. Need state what must happen before work can continue. Decision fail because non-compliant and can cause contamination, restrictions, compressor damage. Risk high/critical? Brazing without nitrogen purge creates internal oxidation scale, contaminates system, can cause compressor failure, block TXV/cap tubes. Critical maybe. Work stage in-progress. Component conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 40? Value not asked 0. Sound_source etc default empty? Schema says string for sound_source, event_time number, rate number, order array. Use empty string, 0.0, []? order array of step-ids maybe include sequence? Since task sequence check, we can provide correct order. Workable list activity IDs? Not asked but maybe activities that can still start? Could leave empty. Findings: brazed joints without nitrogen purge, internal oxidation/black scale, contaminated refrigerant circuit. Actions: stop work, cut out contaminated sections, clean/replace, establish nitrogen purge flow before brazing, re-braze with inert nitrogen purge, pressure test, evacuate/dehydrate to required microns, recharge. Rationale. References: ANSI/ACCA 5 QI? Actually ACCA standards, mfr specs, EPA 608. Also good practice: nitrogen purge during brazing per industry standard. Need no prose outside JSON. Ensure valid JSON.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "critical",
  "work_stage": "in-progress",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 45,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [
    "recover-refrigerant",
    "cut-and-remove-contaminated-sections",
    "clean-prep-joints",
    "establish-nitrogen-purge-flow",
    "braze-with-nitrogen-purge",
    "cool-and-inspect-joints",
    "pressure-test",
    "evacuate-to-micron-spec",
    "charge-and-startup"
  ],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Brazing was performed without a continuous nitrogen purge, producing black oxidation scale inside the tubing visible in cutaway photos.",
    "Internal scale contaminates the refrigerant circuit and can plug metering devices, damage compressors, and accelerate system degradation.",
    "The joint(s) do not meet manufacturer brazing requirements or industry accepted practice for clean, oxide-free internals."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop brazing and evacuation work immediately.",
    "Cut out and discard the contaminated brazed section(s); do not leave scaled tubing in the circuit.",
    "Clean or replace affected components as needed per OEM service information.",
    "Re-braze only after establishing a low-pressure continuous nitrogen purge through the line set toward the open end(s).",
    "Verify purge flow at each joint before applying heat.",
    "After brazing, perform a standing pressure test with dry nitrogen to OEM/ACCA leak-test requirements.",
    "Evacuate the system to the manufacturer-specified micron level before charging.",
    "Charge and start up per OEM specs and record final pressures, temperatures, and superheat/subcooling."
  ],
  "rationale": "Brazing copper in the presence of oxygen without an inert nitrogen purge causes internal oxidation and scale. This violates manufacturer brazing procedures and industry quality standards, creates contamination that cannot be removed by evacuation alone, and risks compressor damage and metering-device restriction. Work cannot continue until the contaminated sections are removed and the joints are re-brazed with proper nitrogen purge.",
  "references": [
    "OEM service information / manufacturer brazing specifications",
    "ACCA quality installation standards (nitrogen purge during brazing)",
    "EPA 608 - refrigerant handling, recovery, and system contamination control"
  ]
}
